title: Automatic Email to Person who Submitted the Form
excerpt: In other form software (Jotforms, etc), an exact copy of the form is emailed to the both the submitter and the receiver the upon submission. Yes, this can be done through multiple automations, but when dealing with thing…

posts.author: lindztaylor (Lindsay)
posts.cookedHtml:
In other form software (Jotforms, etc), an exact copy of the form is emailed to the both the submitter and the receiver the upon submission. Yes, this can be done through multiple automations, but when dealing with things where the exact submission is important (legal, complaints, etc), this would be very helpful without the potential argument of “that isn’t what I submitted” later

Example from Jotforms:

jotform1100×742 32.7 KB
